g.text: From commit to namespaced process — 6 stages
The 'version' (a tag) lives at stage 4. The bytes that execute live at stage 6. The gap is where production magic happens.
should match — usually does, sometimes silently doesn't (see §3)
The version label is a stage-4 attribute
Stages 1–2 are owned by build tooling. Stage 6 is owned by the kernel.
Stages 3–5 are the part most engineers hand-wave through — and that is
where the gap between 'what you deployed' and 'what is running' opens up.
